board.name: GopherCon 2025 — Go Gopher World Domination
board.description: Strategic plan to replace all mascots with the Go gopher. Phase 1: infiltrate every README. Phase 2: take over the Go playground. Phase 3: world peace through channels.

tasks.name: Replace Python logo in all internal docs
tasks.description: Operation Hiss-s-s. Sneak gopher into the Python team's documentation. Start with the favicon.

tasks.name: Plant gopher plushies in every meeting room
tasks.description: Coordinated drop scheduled for Thursday night. 23 plushies acquired from the gift shop.

tasks.name: Convince management that gopher is a brand asset
tasks.description: Draft a deck showing positive correlation between gopher sightings and team morale.

tasks.name: Design gopher astronaut sticker
tasks.description: Gopher in a space suit riding a goroutine. Must include text: To infinity and beyond—buffered.

tasks.name: Create gopher-themed error pages
tasks.description: HTTP 404: gopher digging in wrong hole. HTTP 500: gopher panicked and is being recovered.

tasks.name: Record gopher ASMR for productivity
tasks.description: 10-hour loop of mechanical turk gopher typing on a keyboard. Upload to internal Slack channel.

tasks.name: Gopher wallpaper for all company laptops
tasks.description: Distribute via MDM profile. Gopher wearing a tiny hoodie holding a GopherCon mug.

tasks.name: Rewrite entire codebase in Go
tasks.description: Because gopher said so. Estimated completion: somewhere between 2 weeks and never. May introduce a few minor breaking changes (like everything).

tasks.name: Replace null with nil
tasks.description: Campaign to eliminate the word null from all spoken language in the office. nil is the one true zero value.

tasks.name: Add gopher emoji to every commit message
tasks.description: Pre-commit hook that prepends :gorilla: to each commit. No one has noticed in 3 months.

tasks.name: Ensure all interfaces satisfy io.WriterTo
tasks.description: If it can be written, the gopher approves. If it cannot, wrap it until it does.

tasks.name: Eliminate all semicolons from codebase
tasks.description: Semicolons are a relic of the past. Gopher does not recognize them. The compiler does not need them.

tasks.name: Gopher keeps eating all the := operators
tasks.description: Short variable declarations disappearing from codebase. Suspect gopher mistaking them for sunflower seeds.

tasks.name: Race condition at the gopher feeding station
tasks.description: Two gophers trying to access the same treat at the same time. Added mutex lock. Now one gopher is waiting forever.

tasks.name: Infinite loop in gopher tunnel
tasks.description: Gopher keeps running select {} and refuses to stop. May need runtime.Goexit() intervention.

tasks.name: Gopher refuses to garbage collect
tasks.description: GC pause times are fine but gopher just likes holding onto things. May need to call runtime.GC() manually.

tasks.name: Why is the gopher smiling
tasks.description: Because defer always runs. Even when you panic, the gopher still gets the last laugh.

tasks.name: Can I use gopher in production
tasks.description: gopher is always ready for production. The question is: are you ready for the gopher?

tasks.name: Added gopher to company letterhead
tasks.description: Legal has not noticed yet. Gopher now officially part of all corporate communications.

tasks.name: Changed all loading spinners to gopher digging animation
tasks.description: User engagement up 400%. Users love watching the gopher dig. Some are disappointed when the page finishes loading.

tasks.name: Gopher now has a dedicated Slack emoji
tasks.description: Type :gopher: to summon the mascot. Used 47 times in the first hour.
